meta.purpose: Small-batch follow-up sweep for unresolved candidate athletes after Lot 1-100 initial coverage.
meta.databasePromotionPolicy: Confirmed histories require explicit official/high-trust source support. Ambiguous identity, incomplete context, same-event current rows, and record-marker interpretation stay outside data/database.json. Do not infer achievements from name similarity.

batchScope.reasonForBatch: Initial Lot 1-100 small-batch coverage is complete through Lot 100. This run reviewed the existing unresolved candidate list only, avoiding duplicate work on already logged Lot ranges.
batchScope.openPrCheck: No open Numata athlete research PRs were found before this batch.
batchScope.writeScope: Research log only. No app runtime, CSS, print template, A4 layout, data/database.json, or data/research-candidates.json changes.

sourceIndex.title: data/research-candidates.json on main
sourceIndex.rowLevelExtractionStatus: Existing candidate register contains unresolved entries for Lot 40 齊藤 敬太 and Lot 52 宝利 桃華.

sourceIndex.title: Exact-name web searches for unresolved candidates
sourceIndex.rowLevelExtractionStatus: Searched exact Japanese names with HPA/JPA/IPF/Goodlift/APF/AAPF, powerlifting, bench press, and result-PDF terms. Search results did not produce a promotable official/high-trust row beyond the unresolved candidate notes already present.

candidateFindings.note: Existing candidate note asks for additional confirmation of possible older national/world bench or powerlifting history. This follow-up search did not find an official/high-trust exact-match row sufficient for data/database.json promotion.

athletes.searchNotes: No new confirmed domestic Hokkaido, national, international/world, three-lift powerlifting, single bench press, IPF/Goodlift, APF/AAPF, JPA, or HPA row was promoted. Continue to require official PDF row or Goodlift/IPF athlete-result confirmation before promotion.

candidateFindings.note: Existing candidate note asks for additional confirmation of 2021 onward Hokkaido Classic PL, national bench, and AAP-related history. This follow-up search did not find an official/high-trust exact-match row sufficient for data/database.json promotion.

athletes.searchNotes: No new confirmed domestic Hokkaido, national, international/world, three-lift powerlifting, single bench press, IPF/Goodlift, APF/AAPF, JPA, or HPA row was promoted. Existing confirmed DB histories, if any, were not duplicated.

notPromotedToDatabaseThisRun.reason: Both processed athletes remain candidate-only because this run did not locate a row-level official/high-trust source that confirms the candidate histories with sufficient identity certainty.
notPromotedToDatabaseThisRun.safeNextStep: Do not duplicate Lot-range research logs. Next useful work is either a conservative promotion review of already confirmed prior-history rows in batch logs, or manual official-PDF extraction for unresolved candidates where search indexing is insufficient.
